mapper.sql: id, reg_no, biz_num, corp_num, company_name, ceo_name, biz_type, biz_category, zip_code, addr1, addr2, tel, fax, email, homepage, emp_size, osh_apply, safety_mgr_status, health_mgr_status, acc_rate, certifications, risk_eval, risk_eval_date, hazard_factors, safety_rating, env_rating, reg_status, safety_mgr_name, safety_mgr_position, safety_mgr_dept, safety_mgr_tel, safety_mgr_office_tel, safety_mgr_email, health_mgr_name, health_mgr_position, health_mgr_cert, health_mgr_tel, health_mgr_email, internal_dept, internal_name, internal_tel, memo, contract_start, contract_end, contract_type, contract_amount, work_zone, deleted, created_at, modified_at, modified_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_contractor_registration WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_contractor_registration WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT FROM tb_contractor_registration WHERE deleted = 0
AND (company_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR biz_num LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR reg_no LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR ceo_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND reg_status = #{regStatus}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM tb_contractor_registration WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tb_contractor_registration WHERE reg_no = #{regNo} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_contractor_registration WHERE reg_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_contractor_registration ( reg_no, biz_num, corp_num, company_name, ceo_name, biz_type, biz_category, zip_code, addr1, addr2, tel, fax, email, homepage, emp_size, osh_apply, safety_mgr_status, health_mgr_status, acc_rate, certifications, risk_eval, risk_eval_date, hazard_factors, safety_rating, env_rating, reg_status, safety_mgr_name, safety_mgr_position, safety_mgr_dept, safety_mgr_tel, safety_mgr_office_tel, safety_mgr_email, health_mgr_name, health_mgr_position, health_mgr_cert, health_mgr_tel, health_mgr_email, internal_dept, internal_name, internal_tel, memo, contract_start, contract_end, contract_type, contract_amount, work_zone, deleted, created_at, modified_at, modified_by ) VALUES ( #{regNo}, #{bizNum}, #{corpNum}, #{companyName}, #{ceoName}, #{bizType}, #{bizCategory}, #{zipCode}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{tel}, #{fax}, #{email}, #{homepage}, #{empSize}, #{oshApply}, #{safetyMgrStatus}, #{healthMgrStatus}, #{accRate}, #{certifications}, #{riskEval}, #{riskEvalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{hazardFactors}, #{safetyRating}, #{envRating}, #{regStatus}, #{safetyMgrName}, #{safetyMgrPosition}, #{safetyMgrDept}, #{safetyMgrTel}, #{safetyMgrOfficeTel}, #{safetyMgrEmail}, #{healthMgrName}, #{healthMgrPosition}, #{healthMgrCert}, #{healthMgrTel}, #{healthMgrEmail}, #{internalDept}, #{internalName}, #{internalTel}, #{memo}, #{contractStart,jdbcType=DATE}, #{contractEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, #{contractType}, #{contractAmount}, #{workZone}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{modifiedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_contractor_registration SET biz_num = #{bizNum}, corp_num = #{corpNum}, company_name = #{companyName}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, biz_type = #{bizType}, biz_category = #{bizCategory}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2}, tel = #{tel}, fax = #{fax}, email = #{email}, homepage = #{homepage}, emp_size = #{empSize}, osh_apply = #{oshApply}, safety_mgr_status = #{safetyMgrStatus}, health_mgr_status = #{healthMgrStatus}, acc_rate = #{accRate}, certifications = #{certifications}, risk_eval = #{riskEval}, risk_eval_date = #{riskEvalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, hazard_factors = #{hazardFactors}, safety_rating = #{safetyRating}, env_rating = #{envRating}, reg_status = #{regStatus}, safety_mgr_name = #{safetyMgrName}, safety_mgr_position = #{safetyMgrPosition}, safety_mgr_dept = #{safetyMgrDept}, safety_mgr_tel = #{safetyMgrTel}, safety_mgr_office_tel = #{safetyMgrOfficeTel}, safety_mgr_email = #{safetyMgrEmail}, health_mgr_name = #{healthMgrName}, health_mgr_position = #{healthMgrPosition}, health_mgr_cert = #{healthMgrCert}, health_mgr_tel = #{healthMgrTel}, health_mgr_email = #{healthMgrEmail}, internal_dept = #{internalDept}, internal_name = #{internalName}, internal_tel = #{internalTel}, memo = #{memo}, contract_start = #{contractStart,jdbcType=DATE}, contract_end = #{contractEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, contract_type = #{contractType}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, work_zone = #{workZone}, modified_at = GETDATE(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_contractor_registration SET reg_status = #{regStatus}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
